claims.summary: Recovery, underfill relief, and semantic retirement are distinct mechanisms and should not be collapsed into one viscosity cause.
claims.disposition: Verify separate runtime fields and read-only texture evidence rather than inferring causation from imports.

claims.summary: Semantic projection bias is currently applied only to semantic dimensions using energy and delta inputs.
claims.disposition: Verify the active orchestration call and exact bias tests, while keeping its felt effect unclaimed.

claims.summary: A copied-input semantic-on/off comparison can test density, Shadow, and viscosity associations without changing the live lane.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded deterministic replay with identical nonsemantic input.

claims.summary: Retuning semantic density weighting, bias, retirement, or recovery would alter live Minime processing.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait with reservoir and readiness parity checks.
